Surname.jp: ご主人を待つ慌てん坊メイド

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: お茶でもいかがですか!?

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
